name: zk-airdrop-claim
description: A privacy-preserving Aleo ZK airdrop claim demo with local devnet integration.

scripts.devnet:stop: pkill -f 'snarkos' || true; pkill -f 'leo devnet' || true; lsof -ti tcp:3030 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.devnet:clean: npm run devnet:stop; rm -rf node-* validator-* client-*
scripts.devnet:reset: npm run devnet:clean && npm run devnet:start
scripts.leo:deploy:devnet: cd programs/zk_airdrop_claim && leo deploy --network testnet --endpoint http://localhost:3030 --devnet --private-key APrivateKey1zkp8CZNn3yeCseEtxuVPbDCwSyhGW6yZKUYKfgXmcpoGPWH --broadcast --yes
scripts.leo:init-admin: cd programs/zk_airdrop_claim && leo execute initialize_admin --network testnet --endpoint http://localhost:3030 --devnet --private-key APrivateKey1zkp8CZNn3yeCseEtxuVPbDCwSyhGW6yZKUYKfgXmcpoGPWH --broadcast --yes
scripts.leo:create-campaign: cd programs/zk_airdrop_claim && leo execute create_campaign 1u64 2000u64 --network testnet --endpoint http://localhost:3030 --devnet --private-key APrivateKey1zkp8CZNn3yeCseEtxuVPbDCwSyhGW6yZKUYKfgXmcpoGPWH --broadcast --yes
scripts.leo:query-admin: leo query program zk_airdrop_claim.aleo --mapping-value admin 0u8 --network testnet --endpoint http://localhost:3030 --devnet
scripts.leo:query-campaign: leo query program zk_airdrop_claim.aleo --mapping-value campaigns 1u64 --network testnet --endpoint http://localhost:3030 --devnet
scripts.devnet:bootstrap: npm run leo:deploy:devnet && npm run leo:init-admin && npm run leo:create-campaign && npm run leo:query-campaign
